title: AI Product Manager
description: Spektr (compliance automation startup, backed by Northzone/Seedcamp) is looking for an AI Product Manager to lead AI strategy and execution across products and internal operations. Own the end-to-end AI product lifecycle: ideation, prototyping, validation, deployment, iteration. Work with engineering, compliance, legal. Requires PM experience with AI/ML products, hands-on prototyping, prompt engineering, full AI lifecycle familiarity.
match_reasons: Hands-on AI building (DailyJobMatch: 5k likes on RedNote, 100+ GitHub stars)|Full product cycle experience in personal projects|ML/DL coursework applied in practice|Builder mindset with real user traction|Comfortable with AI pipelines end-to-end
gaps: No formal PM title or experience|No compliance/fintech domain knowledge|No team leadership or roadmap ownership at company level
